headlines.headline: Sources: Anthony Edwards avoids ligament damage, out weeks
headlines.description: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee and is expected to miss multiple weeks, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Randle and the Timberwolves look to clinch series against Denver
headlines.description: Minnesota Timberwolves (49-33, sixth in the Western Conference) vs. Denver Nuggets (54-28, third in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: McDaniels, Jokic clash at end of Timberwolves' Game 4 win
headlines.description: Jaden McDaniels' late layup in Minnesota's 112-96 Game 4 home victory over Denver incited a skirmish with Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets, a scrum that led to ejections as the Timberwolves secured a 3-1 series lead.

headlines.headline: Gretzky's last Oilers jersey sells at auction for record $2.8M
headlines.description: The jersey that Wayne Gretzky wore when he clinched his fourth and final title with the Oilers in Game 4 of the 1988 Stanley Cup Final sold at Goldin Auctions for $2,806,000, the most ever paid for a hockey jersey.

headlines.headline: Sidney Crosby, Penguins stay alive with Game 4 win over Flyers
headlines.description: Pittsburgh captain Sidney Crosby opened the scoring with his first goal of the playoffs and set up defenseman Kris Letang's critical third-period goal with a nifty soccer-style kick, as the Penguins beat the Flyers 4-2 in Game 4.
